scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix socket-node && npm install --prefix dashboard-next && npm install --prefix widget-preact && npm install --prefix landing-next
scripts.dev: concurrently --names "django,socket,dashboard,widget,landing" --prefix-colors "green,blue,magenta,cyan,yellow" "npm run dev:django" "npm run dev:socket" "npm run dev:dashboard" "npm run dev:widget" "npm run dev:landing"
